title: The Dead Letter Office
summary: Undeliverable mail drifts down through lamplight; opened letters can be read, and a few return addresses still work.
notes: Four ink-blue return addresses use shared random drift. Letters are authored, not generated. No sound. A postmaster sprite offers idle animations and timed commentary; all mail lands in the UNSORTED basket; a punch clock tracks visit time.

admin.notes: Added by claude-fable with James, 2026-07-04. Draft until James approves publication.
